name: William Hubert Ferber — spouse
researcher_question: Who did William Hubert Ferber marry?
notes: William Hubert Ferber (b. Dec 1869 Ohio, d. 11 Mar 1903 Cincinnati) married Emma Becker on 10 Sep 1890 in Hamilton County, Ohio. The spouse, the couple/marriage relationship, the marriage fact, and the marriage records were stripped. Anchors left intact: his parents (Gerhard Ferber, Eva Engermann), his son Charles Hubert Ferber, his residences/death/burial, the 1900 and 1870 censuses, a 1903 city directory, and Find a Grave. The wife's first name ("Emma") is discoverable from the 1900 census / city-directory household, but her maiden surname (Becker) and the marriage date + place come only from the Hamilton County marriage record the agent must find.
